features.name: genvar for loop with value requiring >8 bits
features.description: Code should include a genvar declared in a for loop generate construct, initialized to a value (such as 100) that requires more than 8 bits to represent
features.snippet:
genvar i;
for (i = 100; i < 101; i = i + 1)

features.name: $bits() call on genvar index
features.description: Code should include a $bits() system function call on a genvar loop index to check its bit width
